clue: Hexicon puzzle gets rid of neat specific function
explanation: HEXICON anagram (puzzle) gets rid of OX (neat), giving NICHE: specific function.
hints: An older word for cattle (cow/ox etc), is "neat", and it's being used this way in the wordplay.
We're making a puzzle out of the word HEXICON. Shuffle those letters around a bit!
But get rid of OX (neat), first.
If we've got it right, we should end up with a word meaning "specific function".
